---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for HookSniff
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## API Design (if applicable)

```bash
# Example API call
curl -X POST https://api.hooksniff.com/v1/new-endpoint \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "field": "value" }'
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other solutions or features you've considered and why they didn't work for you.

## Use Case

Describe your use case. How would this feature be used in a real-world scenario?

## Impact

- **Who benefits?** [e.g., all users, enterprise customers, SDK users]
- **How often?** [e.g., daily, per-webhook, one-time setup]
- **Priority**: [e.g., nice-to-have, blocking my workflow]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references here.
